summary: Retested 4 admin dashboard wiring fixes on AdminDashboard. All 4 pass: (1) TabsList renders 5 tabs including tab-settings; (2) Ajustes tab reveals settings-panel with settings-hero-preview, hero-upload-input, hero-url-input and hero-url-save-btn; (3) size-breakdown-table rendered on dashboard tab after stock-chart-card with correct columns 4/6/8/10/12/14/16/S/M/L/XL/Total and 24 rows; (4) Changing size-filter-select to 'L' updates StatCard labels to 'Stock talla L', 'Stock bajo talla L', 'Sin stock talla L' and chart title to 'Stock talla L por producto'.

issues: React hydration warning: span inside <option> from Emergent dev instrumentation (x-excluded spans wrap {sz} expression). Non-breaking dev-mode warning only.

critical_code_review_comments: ResponsiveContainer emits width/height -1 warnings briefly on initial mount; consider setting explicit minHeight on container to avoid recharts warnings.
AdminDashboard.jsx is 731 lines — close to the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting SizeBreakdownTable, SettingsPanel, OrdersTable, ProductCard into separate files for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard scope for iter3 is fully green. Any future changes: verify tab-settings still renders settings-panel and size-breakdown-table remains on dashboard tab. No other regressions observed.
